The '''''Loose Cannon''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] operated by a group of privateers known only by the name of this vessel.

The [[Loose Cannon pirates]] were involved in a scam whereby the [[SCT Scout craft|Scout Craft]] ''[[Ravenno]]'' lured traders into an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] with the promise of black-market [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]. Once the bacta exchange was taking place, ''Loose Cannon'', accompanied by a pair of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and ordered the hapless victims of the scam to surrender.

However, the pirates got more than they bargained for when the [[Azzameen family]] proved too difficult to subdue. Along with several of the other pirate craft, ''Loose Cannon'' was heavily damaged, perhaps even destroyed, in the skirmish.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
